_comment: Keystone agent registry as code. Maps an autonomous coding agent's author id to a scope manifest enforced deterministically (fnmatch path globs + max blast radius). A change an agent opens outside this scope is a hard SCOPE-VIOLATION. Matching is literal; there is no ML and no fuzzy matching. A registry miss is reported as AGENT_UNREGISTERED (detected, not proven). Editing this file is itself a governed change.
